test_patch:
diff --git a/test/units/plugins/callback/test_callback.py b/test/units/plugins/callback/test_callback.py
--- a/test/units/plugins/callback/test_callback.py
+++ b/test/units/plugins/callback/test_callback.py
@@ -27,6 +27,8 @@
 from units.compat import unittest
 from units.compat.mock import MagicMock
 
+from ansible.executor.task_result import TaskResult
+from ansible.inventory.host import Host
 from ansible.plugins.callback import CallbackBase
 
 
@@ -46,6 +48,92 @@
         display_mock.verbosity = 5
         cb = CallbackBase(display=display_mock)
         self.assertIs(cb._display, display_mock)
+
+    # test/units/plugins/callback/test_callback.py::TestCallback::test_host_label_missing_delegated_target
+    def test_host_label_missing_delegated_target(self):
+        result = TaskResult(
+            host=Host('host1'),
+            task=None,
+            return_data={'_ansible_delegated_vars': {'ansible_host': '   ', 'ansible_hostname': ''}},
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(CallbackBase.host_label(result), 'host1 -> unavailable')
+
+    # test/units/plugins/callback/test_callback.py::TestCallback::test_host_label_missing_delegated_target_empty_metadata
+    def test_host_label_missing_delegated_target_empty_metadata(self):
+        result = TaskResult(
+            host=Host('host1'),
+            task=None,
+            return_data={'_ansible_delegated_vars': {}},
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(CallbackBase.host_label(result), 'host1 -> unavailable')
+
+    # test/units/plugins/callback/test_callback.py::TestCallback::test_host_label_prefers_canonical_delegated_identity
+    def test_host_label_prefers_canonical_delegated_identity(self):
+        result = TaskResult(
+            host=Host('host1'),
+            task=None,
+            return_data={'_ansible_delegated_vars': {
+                'delegated_host_name': 'relay-display',
+                'ansible_host': '10.0.0.25',
+                'ansible_hostname': 'relay-fallback',
+                'inventory_hostname': 'delegate.example.com',
+            }},
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(CallbackBase.host_label(result), 'host1 -> relay-display')
+
+    # test/units/plugins/callback/test_callback.py::TestCallback::test_host_label_prefers_ansible_hostname_over_other_hints
+    def test_host_label_prefers_ansible_hostname_over_other_hints(self):
+        result = TaskResult(
+            host=Host('host1'),
+            task=None,
+            return_data={'_ansible_delegated_vars': {
+                'delegated_host_name': '   ',
+                'ansible_host': '  relay-address  ',
+                'ansible_hostname': 'relay-name',
+                'inventory_hostname': 'delegate.example.com',
+            }},
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(CallbackBase.host_label(result), 'host1 -> relay-name')
+
+    # test/units/plugins/callback/test_callback.py::TestCallback::test_host_label_falls_back_to_ansible_delegated_host
+    def test_host_label_falls_back_to_ansible_delegated_host(self):
+        result = TaskResult(
+            host=Host('host1'),
+            task=None,
+            return_data={'_ansible_delegated_vars': {
+                'delegated_host_name': '',
+                'ansible_hostname': '   ',
+                'ansible_delegated_host': '  delegate-host  ',
+            }},
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(CallbackBase.host_label(result), 'host1 -> delegate-host')
+
+    # test/units/plugins/callback/test_callback.py::TestCallback::test_host_label_truncates_each_side
+    def test_host_label_truncates_each_side(self):
+        result = TaskResult(
+            host=Host('abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv'),
+            task=None,
+            return_data={'_ansible_delegated_vars': {'ansible_delegated_host': 'zyxwvutsrqponmlkjihg'}},
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(CallbackBase.host_label(result), 'abcdefghijklmno... -> zyxwvutsrqponml...')
+
+    # test/units/plugins/callback/test_callback.py::TestCallback::test_host_label_quotes_collision_cases
+    def test_host_label_quotes_collision_cases(self):
+        result = TaskResult(
+            host=Host('host1 -> west'),
+            task=None,
+            return_data={'_ansible_delegated_vars': {'ansible_delegated_host': "edge\'two"}},
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(CallbackBase.host_label(result), "'host1 -> west' -> 'edge\\\'two'")
+
+    # test/units/plugins/callback/test_callback.py::TestCallback::test_host_label_quotes_backslash_only
+    def test_host_label_quotes_backslash_only(self):
+        result = TaskResult(
+            host=Host('host1'),
+            task=None,
+            return_data={'_ansible_delegated_vars': {'ansible_delegated_host': 'edge\\path'}},
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(CallbackBase.host_label(result), "host1 -> 'edge\\\\path'")
 
     # TODO: import callback module so we can patch callback.cli/callback.C
